dept-takeout.label: Take-Out & Delivery
dept-takeout.title: Packaging that travels well
dept-takeout.text: Hinged containers, deli cups, kraft boxes and sushi trays — every to-go format, case-ready.

dept-drinkware.label: Cups, Lids & Straws
dept-drinkware.title: Cups for every drink you pour
dept-drinkware.text: Hot cups, cold cups, portion cups and straws — matched lids in stock.

dept-tabletop.label: Tabletop & Serving
dept-tabletop.title: Set the table, front of house
dept-tabletop.text: Plates, cutlery and napkins that make service feel finished.

dept-bags-wrap.label: Bags & Wrap
dept-bags-wrap.title: Carry it out, wrap it up
dept-bags-wrap.text: T-shirt bags, paper bags, foil and cling wrap for prep and pickup.

dept-janitorial.label: Janitorial & Safety
dept-janitorial.title: Clean, safe, well-stocked
dept-janitorial.text: Gloves, tissue and back-of-house supplies to keep the day running.
